'''Zor Vlahu''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who fought in the [[Ruusan campaign]] during the [[New Sith Wars]]. He had a sister named [[Myl Vlahu]], and the two died in an assault on the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]].<ref name="jvs" /> Vlahu's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] was claimed by the Sith and used by a Sith minion, attempting to impersonate a [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]], in a later battle.<ref name="J3">[[Jedi vs. Sith 3|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 3]]</ref> The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Zor Vlahu (planet)|Zor Vlahu]] in the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Ruusan system]] bore his name.<ref name="Kyle">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/kylekatarnstale5|text=Light and Dark: Kyle Katarn's Tale, Mission 5|int=Kyle Katarn's Tale}}</ref>
